description: This lesson covers more advanced techniques such as blanching, steaming, and seasoning.

steps.instruction: Learn the blanching technique for vegetables.
Practice steaming vegetables to retain nutrients.
Understand how to properly season dishes.

safety_tips: Always use tongs or a slotted spoon when blanching.
Be careful of steam when opening the lid of the steamer.
Taste your food as you season to avoid over-seasoning.
